name: p-flow
description: Disciplined task development flow for Claude Code: secrets deny-list, Conventional Commits + <type>/<slug> branches, spec templates, and a skill stack for brainstorm → plan → verify → review → push (review skills dispatch general-purpose subagents with inline reviewer templates). Commands: init, task-start, task-end. Skills: using-p-flow, init, task-brainstorming, writing-plan, verification-before-completion, requesting-code-review, requesting-task-review. Discoverable via SessionStart hook.
